lookAround.txt: Maybe the residents can help us out.

well.txt: Well... it doesn't hurt to check!

rusure.txt: Are you sure? We'll need to find parts for the engine somewhere.

rusure2.txt: If they don't have the parts, they can probably point us in the right direction.

oldRuins.txt: These ruins look older than the town. I wonder what civilization built them.

oldRuins2.txt: Maybe I'll find out more later.

leftHouse.txt: The door is locked, but the lights are on.

leftHouse2.txt: It doesn't look like anyone's inside.

rightHouse.txt: This house has a bowl of cat food at the door.

owletStart.txt: Who are you? Have you seen any one else in the area?

choices.label: We just arrived, we're stranded here.
We haven't seen anyone but you.
No, we actually need help finding engine parts.

owlet1.txt: Okay, but you didn't see anyone? Anyone at all?

owlet2.txt: Oh this is bad. I can't believe this! Everyone's been missing for days!

choices.label: Um, you wouldn't happen to know where we can get engine parts would you?

what.txt: I don't know! One day everyone was here, and the next day they were all gone!

what2.txt: But why are you here then? You're not anyone I know.

what3.txt: We crashed here, we're stuck until we can find parts to fix our engine.

help.txt: YOU need help? I don't think I'll be much help by myself.

help2.txt: Theres a mechanic in town, but they're missing like everyone else.

help3.txt: If you can help me find them, they can help you with the parts you need.
